message.abstract: <jats:p>The authors have withdrawn this manuscript because there have been a number of mutations of COVID-19, since the manuscript was posted, as well as changes in virus behavior, such as increased transmissibility. As a result, both the vaccination strategies and parameters used during the simulation are less applicable to the current situation, and thus the results from the simulations may be incorrect for the current situation. Therefore, the authors do not wish this work to be cited as reference for the project. If you have any questions, please contact the corresponding author.</jats:p>
title: Using Novel, Agent-Based Periodic Mobility Model with Super Spreaders to Analyze Vaccination Strategies for COVID-19
